info.title: Enterprise Retail & Strategic Inventory System
info.description: Backend API for the Enterprise Retail & Strategic Inventory System – a cost-effective, secure, IoT-enabled billing and inventory platform.

post.description:
Self-registration for customers (mobile app).
Shopkeeper / cashier accounts are created by the admin.

Step 1 of login.
- Customer  → returns tokens immediately.
- Admin / Cashier → sends OTP email; client must call /auth/verify-otp next.
Step 2 – submit OTP to get tokens.

post.description:
Create and complete a billing transaction.
Validates stock, computes totals, records payment, decrements inventory.
